criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented _append_template_patterns() method in AutoBuildContextLoader that loads manifest, runs load_template_patterns + select_patterns, formats via format_pattern_block, and appends the result to prompt_text. Called from both the Graphiti-enabled and graceful-degradation paths in get_player_context(). Tests test_player_context_contains_pattern_block and test_wiring_logs_selected_files verify this behaviour.
